REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3658 Folsom Street)
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Garcia for Oscar Linares (Petitioner/Personal Representative).

The sale was confirmed at $582,000.00. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. McDaniels.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Continued To Oct-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Garcia for Martha Linares.

Mr. Garcia stated that they had reached a settlement with regard to the old petition. In addition, he requested a continuance stating that a new petition on a different will was would be filed today. The matter was continued to October 21, 2008. The special letters were also extended to that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Mann.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Off Calendar

Ex Parte Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Garcia for Martha Linares (Petitioner). Bertha Linares (Daughter), Juan Linares (Son) and Orlando Linares (Son) were also present.

Mr. Garcia stated that the will contest was heard at the last hearing, that the proof of service was filed yesterday and asked the Court to dispense with his clients appearance as the present parties were not opposing the petition. In addition, he stated that there were no liquid assets for payment of the bond and that his client was not in possession of the will. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond was set at $25,000.00. The letters expire on September 16, 2008. The Petitioner's appearance was waived.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B Mann.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Continued To Sep-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Continued To Sep-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Garcia for Marta Linares. Jorge Misisian for Gustavo Linares.

Mr. Garcia stated that the will contest was at issue, that he needed time to explore the matter and requested 90 days for discovery. In addition, he stated that he was concerned about abuse of possession of the property and that there was a need for a Special Administrator. Mr. Misisian argued that there was no need for a Special Administator as nothing had been brought to his attention. The Court granted the 90 day continuance. Mr. Garcia is to file his petition for appointment of Special Administrator. The matter was continued to September 16, 2008 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Tamara Willat-Harrison CSR#4609. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
